  1. Unnamed Package
Contents
  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Unnamed Package

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Command
    Command class - represents a single user command in the game.
    CommandWords
    CommandWords class - stores all valid command words for the "Henriette's Feast" game and provides a way to check them.
    Game
    Game class - the main engine of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
    GameEngine
    GameEngine class - handles the game logic of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
    Item
    Item class - represents an item in the game "Henriette's Feast".
    ItemList
    Manages a collection of items, accessible by name.
    Parser
    This class is part of the "World of Zuul" application.
    Player
    Represents the player in the game.
    Room
    Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game.
    UserInterface
    This class implements a simple graphical user interface with a text entry area, a text output area and an optional image.
